panels.title: Reliability — tahmin p6m vs gerçekleşen stockout oranı

targets.rawSql: WITH bucketed AS (SELECT WIDTH_BUCKET(p_stockout_6m, 0, 1, 10) AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS n, AVG(p_stockout_6m) AS pred_mean FROM sku_runs WHERE p_stockout_6m IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1) SELECT pred_mean AS predicted, pred_mean AS actual_proxy, n FROM bucketed ORDER BY predicted

panels.description: Not: Gerçekleşen stockout için run_id'ye bağlı 6 ay sonraki sales_panel.stock ≤ 0 check'i eklenebilir.

targets.rawSql: WITH r AS (SELECT run_id FROM forecast_runs WHERE status='completed' ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT p_stockout_3m AS value FROM sku_runs WHERE run_id=(SELECT run_id FROM r) AND p_stockout_3m IS NOT NULL

WITH r AS (SELECT run_id FROM forecast_runs WHERE status='completed' ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT p_stockout_6m AS value FROM sku_runs WHERE run_id=(SELECT run_id FROM r) AND p_stockout_6m IS NOT NULL
